description_long: This is a medium-sized, upholstered sofa with a distinctive burnt orange fabric covering its entire exterior. The sofa features a single, broad seat cushion and a continuous backrest and armrest structure that wraps around three sides in a classic Chesterfield style, with deep button tufting along the back and arms. The armrests are rolled and padded, matching the height of the backrest and providing a plush, inviting appearance. The sofa sits on four short, rounded black legs, slightly elevating it off the ground. The upholstery appears to be a woven textile with a subtle, uniform texture, and the overall form is boxy yet softened by the rounded arms and tufted details. This piece would be suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered lounges.
description: A burnt orange, tufted Chesterfield-style sofa with rolled arms and a single broad seat cushion, upholstered in textured fabric and supported by four short black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, rolled armrests, and button-tufted backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rolled armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the rolled armrest and visible seat depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, broad, attached seat cushion with a continuous, tufted backrest; no loose or individual cushions visible.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, featuring deep button tufting and a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded black legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a curved, tufted design integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burnt orange fabric with a subtle woven texture and deep button tufting along the back and arms.
